example: Marley was the sole partner and co-proprietor of the counting house of Scrooge and Marley.
kana: かいけいじむしょ、かいけいしつ

example: Marley was as dead as a doorknail.
ja: ドアの釘（非常に死んでいることの比喩）
kana: ドアのくぎ（ひじょうにしんでいることのひゆ）
romaji: doa no kugi (hijō ni shinde iru koto no hiyu)

example: Scrooge was as solitary as an oyster.
kana: こどくな、ひとりの

example: He spoke out shrewdly in his grating voice.
kana: みみざわりな、ふかい

example: No beggars implored him to bestow a trifle.
kana: こんがんする、あいがんする

example: On Christmas Eve, a biting foggy day, Scrooge sat at his desk.
ja: 刺すような、厳しい寒さの
kana: さすような、きびしいさむさの

example: His clerk was in a dismal little cell, trying to warm himself.
kana: いんきな、いんうつな

example: Two portly gentlemen entered, soliciting donations for the poor.
kana: こんがんする、つのる

example: If they would rather die, they had better do it and decrease the surplus population.
kana: よじょうじんこう

example: Scrooge went home to his gloomy old chambers.
kana: うすぐらい、いんうつな

example: He saw, instead of the door knocker, the face of Jacob Marley.
ja: ドアノッカー、ノックするもの
kana: ドアノッカー、ノックするもの

example: A clanking dreadfully disturbing noise came from the cellar.
ja: ガチャガチャと鳴る音
kana: ガチャガチャとなるおと

example: It was Jacob Marley, dragging an immense heavy chain forged of cash boxes.
kana: たんぞうする、つくりだす

example: I am doomed to wander the earth, witnessing human scenes.
ja: 運命づけられた、破滅する運命の
kana: うんめいづけられた、はめつするうんめいの
romaji: unmei dzukerareta, hametsu suru unmei no

example: You will be haunted by three spirits.
kana: ゆうれいにとりつかれる

example: The air was filled with mournful, restless fountains.
ja: 悲しげな、哀愁を帯びた
kana: かな しげな、あいしゅうをおびた

example: Filled with a great, though still skeptical, dread.
kana: かいぎてきな、うたがいぶかい

example: Are you the spirit whose coming was foretold to me?
ja: 予言された、予告された
kana: よげんされた、よこくされた

example: They passed instantaneously through the walls.
kana: しゅんじに、そくざに

example: His old boarding school, cheerless and deserted.
kana: げんきのない、いんきな

example: He was an apprentice in a bustling warehouse.
kana: みならい、とてい

example: Fezywig presided over a grand Christmas party.
ja: 司会を務める、主宰する
kana: しかいをつとめる、しゅさいする

example: You praise him as if he were a benefactor of mankind.
kana: おんじん、きふしゃ

example: Another idol has displaced me, a golden one.
kana: ぐうぞう、すうはいのたいしょう

example: She dissolved their engagement.
kana: こんやく、やくそく

example: The ghost remained impassive.
kana: むひょうじょうの、れいたんな

example: He extinguished the light emanating from its head.
kana: はっする、はなつ

example: Enthroned upon this mountain of food sat a giant spirit.
kana: そくいする、おうざにすわる

example: It bore a glowing torch shaped like a horn of plenty.
kana: たいまつ、トーチ

example: The spirit sprinkled incense from its torch upon them.
kana: おこう、こうをたく

example: Tiny Tim was a cripple.
ja: 身体障害者、足の不自由な人
kana: しんたいしょうがいしゃ、あしのふじゆうなひと
romaji: shintai shougai sha, ashi no fujiyuu na hito

example: He bore a little crutch and wore iron frames upon his limbs.
kana: まつばづえ

example: Scrooge hung his head in penitence.
kana: かいご、ざんげ

example: A mighty voice called his name.
kana: きょうりょくな、いだいな

example: Two pitiful, wretched children emerged.
kana: あわれな、あわれみをさそう

example: The boy is ignorance.
kana: むち、むがく

example: I see that written, which is doom, unless the writing be erased.
kana: はめつ、うんめい

example: A solemn dark phantom shrouded in a deep black garment came gliding in.
kana: ゆうれい、げんえい

example: Phantom shrouded in a deep black garment.
kana: おおう、つつむ

example: He could see nothing but the folds of its black attire.
kana: ふくそう、いしょう

example: The rich man was so despised that no one would attend his funeral.
kana: けいべつされた、きらわれた

example: They were at an infamous rag and bone shop.
kana: こぶつしょう、がらくたや

example: On the miserable, uncurdened bed lay a lonely body.
ja: 負担のない、重荷のない
kana: ふたんのない、おもにのない
romaji: futan no nai, omoni no nai

example: They had a day's grace to gather the payment, a small reprieve from ruin.
ja: 執行猶予、一時的な救済
kana: しっこうゆうよ、いちじてきなきゅうさい

example: The family was quietly mourning.
ja: 喪に服すること、悲しみ
kana: もにふくすること、かなしみ

example: Scrooge fell to his knees before the specter.
kana: ゆうれい、ぼうれい

example: He reached out to clutch the spirit's hand.
kana: つかむ、にぎる

example: The phantom's hood and dress dwindled down into a bedpost.
kana: げんしょうする、しゅくしょうする

example: He encountered one of the portly gentlemen who had solicited charity.
kana: こんがんする、つのる

example: A great many back payments are included in it.
kana: みはらいきん、ちえんしはらい

example: Bob was aghast, believing his master had gone mad.
kana: がくぜんとした、きょうふした

example: Some people laughed at his transformation.
kana: へんか、へんしん

example: Tiny Tim uttered a favourite saying.
kana: はっする、くちにだす
